assertions.description: INCORRECT: The Apple II+ schematic is a valid KiCad 6 file (version 20230121) with 172 components, 417 nets and 2570 wires successfully parsed. However sheets_parsed is null and sheet_files is null, while kicad_version is reported as 'unknown' despite file_version 20230121 being KiCad 8. The component data was extracted correctly but the sheet metadata fields are not populated, suggesting the sheet tracking logic has a bug for KiCad 6+ single-file schematics.
